components.text: AI Answer: Weekend Citywalk Coffee Picks
I will build a 3-stop coffee route for a relaxed weekend citywalk, balancing walking distance, seating comfort, and visual variety.
Stop 1 is ready. I started with a bright, easy entry point so the list feels strong from the first card.

value.name: Rooftop Brew Room
value.meta: 8 min walk from the start · hand brew · bright window seats
value.reason: Best for the first stop of the route. The rooftop corner and slower hand-brew pace make it easy to settle into the day without feeling rushed.

components.text: Two cards are in place now: a calm opening stop and a larger cafe for the middle of the route.

components.text: The last card is loading in. I am keeping the route compact so the stream ends with a clear closeout option near transit.
